businessSummary.oneLiner: Leading AI data analytics platform for government and enterprise, built on Gotham (defense), Foundry (enterprise), and AIP (AI Platform)
businessSummary.description: Palantir builds AI data analytics platforms for government and enterprise. FY2025 revenue $4.48B (+60%). US commercial revenue surpassed $650M (Q4 +137% YoY). Pentagon adopted Maven AI as official program of record for military-wide deployment. Selected as software developer for $185B Golden Dome missile defense. FY2026 guidance: $7.19B-$7.41B (+60-65%).

keyMetrics.name: Trailing P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: 6.7x the S&P 500 IT sector avg of 34x. Down from 234x on price decline but still extreme premium

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E (FY2026E)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on FY2026 EPS $1.32. Down from 112x

keyMetrics.name: P/S Ratio
keyMetrics.interpretation: 5-8x premium vs software avg 10-15x. PEG 2.36 still indicates overvaluation relative to growth

keyMetrics.name: 50-Day SMA
keyMetrics.interpretation: Broke below 50-day SMA. Now below both 50-day ($149) and 200-day ($164)

keyMetrics.name: Trefis 'Soaring' Analysis
keyMetrics.interpretation: Trefis analyzed conditions that could trigger 50%+ rallies similar to 2020 and 2024

growthDrivers.title: Trefis: 'What Could Send PLTR Soaring' (3/27)
growthDrivers.description: Analyzed past 50%+ rally patterns and identified current triggers. Compared to 2020 and 2024 explosive rallies

growthDrivers.title: Golden Dome $185B Missile Defense Software (3/25)
growthDrivers.description: Selected with Anduril to develop software for Trump administration's $185B Golden Dome missile defense system

growthDrivers.title: Czech National Bank Buys PLTR (3/26)
growthDrivers.description: Central bank purchased 24,730 shares. A central bank buying an AI defense stock is a powerful institutional confidence signal

growthDrivers.title: Bain & Company Global Partnership (3/26)
growthDrivers.description: Expanded partnership with Bain to accelerate global AIP and Foundry adoption through consulting channels

growthDrivers.title: Maven AI Military-Wide Adoption (3/20)
growthDrivers.description: Pentagon designated Maven Smart System as official program of record for all branches

growthDrivers.title: FY2026 Revenue Guidance $7.19B-$7.41B (+60-65%)
growthDrivers.description: Management confident in growth acceleration. US commercial segment as core growth engine

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 20+ years of government defense AI track record, highest security clearances, Maven military adoption, Iran war combat verification. Moats money can't buy

moats.description: Ontology platform deeply integrated into government/military systems. Replacement costs prohibitively high
Highest-level clearances and 20+ year government trust. Virtually impossible for new entrants to replicate
AIP Bootcamps drive rapid customer acquisition. Ontology ecosystem expanding
Thousands of real-time strikes in Iran conflict. Combat data is competitive advantage

competitors.name: Anduril Industries
competitors.detail: Defense AI/drone startup. Collaborating with Palantir on Golden Dome. $60B valuation

competitors.name: Snowflake / Databricks
competitors.detail: Enterprise data platform competitors. Far behind in government/defense access

competitors.name: Microsoft / AWS
competitors.detail: Cloud giants entering government AI. Scale but lack Palantir's deep Ontology integration

competitors.name: C3.ai
competitors.detail: Enterprise AI platform. Significantly behind in revenue scale and growth rate

recentNews.headline: PLTR -3.05% to $143.06, Breaks Below 50-Day SMA
recentNews.significance: Dow -793pts correction day selloff. Broke below 50-day ($149) SMA. Now below both key moving averages. Golden Dome +6.8% fully reversed in 3 days plus further decline

recentNews.headline: Trefis: 'What Could Send Palantir Stock Soaring'
recentNews.significance: Analyzed past 50%+ rally patterns. Defense AI expansion and commercial acceleration as key triggers

recentNews.headline: 24/7 Wall St: 'Palantir 2030 Price Prediction'
recentNews.significance: Projects 10.65% total return over next 12 months with 90% confidence. Called 2026 'turbulent'

recentNews.headline: Seeking Alpha: 'Palantir's Old Narrative Is Falling Apart'
recentNews.significance: Sell opinion citing overvaluation and competition. Narrative shift debate intensifying

recentNews.headline: Golden Dome $185B Missile Defense Selection, +6.8% Surge
recentNews.significance: Selected for $185B space-based missile defense system. Gains fully reversed within 3 days

analystOpinions.notableComment: Consensus $186.60. Upside expanded from 27% to 30.7%. Analyst opinion deeply divided: 17 Buy, 14 Hold, 5 Sell. Valuation debate is the core issue

risks.title: Extreme Valuation + 'Narrative Collapse' Debate
risks.description: P/E 227x, P/S 76x, PEG 2.36. Seeking Alpha argues narrative is breaking down. Growth premium justification under fire

risks.title: Below Both Key SMAs, Technical Weakness
risks.description: Broke 50-day ($149) and 200-day ($164). Golden Dome gains reversed in 3 days. Selling momentum dominant

risks.title: Market Panic, Dow in Correction
risks.description: Dow -793pts. VIX 31.05. High-valuation growth stocks hit hardest in this environment

risks.title: Analyst Opinion Deeply Divided
risks.description: 17 Buy, 14 Hold, 5 Sell. Valuation debate unresolved

risks.title: Stock-Based Compensation Dilution
risks.description: Share count increased 4.67% in one year. Ongoing SBC dilutes existing shareholders

buyReasons.title: Trefis 'Soaring' Analysis: 50%+ Rally Possible
buyReasons.rationale: Historical patterns from 2020 and 2024 could repeat. Defense + commercial acceleration as conditions

buyReasons.title: Irreplaceable Defense AI Position
buyReasons.rationale: Golden Dome $185B + Maven adoption + Iran combat verification + Czech central bank buying. Unmatched moat

buyReasons.title: 31% Below All-Time High
buyReasons.rationale: 52-week high $207 to current $143. Fundamentals strengthened by Golden Dome, Maven, Bain

buyReasons.title: ROE 25.98%, Financial Strength
buyReasons.rationale: Debt/equity 0.03, cash $7.18B, FCF $2.1B. Rock-solid balance sheet

overallOpinion: Broke below the 50-day SMA ($149). Golden Dome's +6.8% surge was fully reversed in 3 days plus further decline. Market-wide indiscriminate selling on Dow correction
Trefis published a 'what could send PLTR soaring' analysis, comparing current conditions to 2020 and 2024 when 50%+ rallies occurred. Golden Dome, Maven, and commercial +137% growth are the triggers
The core problem remains valuation. P/E 227x, P/S 76x, analysts split 17 Buy vs 14 Hold vs 5 Sell. Seeking Alpha's 'narrative collapse' debate continues
Closed at $143.06. 31% below ATH. Target $187 (+31%). Fundamentals are clear but valuation is expensive and market panic persists. Small position dollar-cost averaging only

investmentVerdict.summary: Fundamentals are strong enough for Trefis to analyze rally potential, but P/E 227x with market panic and 50-day SMA breach make aggressive buying risky. Small position DCA possible, but wait for valuation compression or earnings confirmation

sources.name: Trefis - Soaring Analysis
sources.description: 50%+ rally pattern analysis and current triggers

witty.hook: PLTR: missile defense stock falls on war escalation. You can't make this up
witty.text:
$PLTR $143.06(-3.05%)

Golden Dome +6.8% Monday, all reversed by Thursday. 50-day SMA broken. A missile defense software company dropping on war fears is peak market irony.

Seeking Alpha says 'narrative collapse.' Trefis says '50%+ rally possible.' P/E 227x. Analysts split 17/14/5. Nobody agrees on anything.

Fundamentals: Maven, Golden Dome, commercial +137%. These are real. The price tag just scares people.

31% off ATH. Hold. Small DCA if convicted. May 4 decides.

empathy.hook: PLTR shareholders, the Golden Dome reversal must be deeply frustrating
empathy.text:
$PLTR $143.06(-3.05%), 31% off highs.

Monday's Golden Dome celebration turned into Thursday's selloff. 50-day broken. It's deeply frustrating.

But Trefis sees conditions for a major rally. Golden Dome $185B, Maven, Czech central bank buying. The fundamentals are real and strengthening.

This is Dow correction, VIX 31, market-wide panic. Not a Palantir problem.

Small DCA positions. Don't overextend. May 4 earnings will clarify. Patience is your best tool right now.
